item.title: Unauthorized Users in Discord Group Had Weekslong Access to Anthropic’s Supposedly-Super-Dangerous Claude Mythos Model 摘要
item.description:
Bloomberg reports that unauthorized users in a private Discord group accessed Anthropic's new Mythos AI model, which the company claims is powerful enough to enable dangerous cyberattacks. The group gained access on April 7, the same day Anthropic announced limited testing, and has been using it regularly for non-cybersecurity purposes. The same group also accessed other unreleased Claude models. This security lapse follows Anthropic accidentally exposing Claude Code's source code weeks earlier. The incident raises questions about Anthropic's security practices and the credibility of their warnings about Mythos's dangers.
标签: Anthropic, Mythos, AI security, unauthorized access, Claude, cybersecurity, data breach, Discord, Bloomberg, AI safety

item.title: Microsoft Offers Voluntary Retirement to Long-Serving Employees 摘要
item.description:
Microsoft is offering a voluntary retirement program to US employees whose combined years of service and age total 70 or more. The program, announced by HR chief Amy Coleman, includes generous company support and aims to avoid larger layoffs ahead of the new financial year in July. The Verge reports that this affects a small percentage of US employees. The article contrasts this with Apple, where some employees have much higher combined totals, suggesting Microsoft's threshold is relatively low.
标签: Microsoft, voluntary retirement, layoffs, HR, tech industry, employee benefits, US employees, workforce reduction, corporate restructuring

item.title: Eight for Eight 摘要
item.description:
Chris Espinosa, an early Apple employee (#8), will join an elite club of former Apple employees who have worked under a number of CEOs equal to or greater than their employee number. The club includes Steve Wozniak (#1, 1 CEO), Steve Jobs (#2, 2 CEOs), Mike Markkula (#3, 3 CEOs), and Bill Fernandez (#4, 4 CEOs). Espinosa (#8) has worked under 8 CEOs: Scott, Markkula, Sculley, Spindler, Amelio, Jobs, Cook, and Ternus, achieving a perfect record of longevity and adaptability at Apple.
标签: Apple, Chris Espinosa, employee number, CEO, history, longevity, Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, Mike Markkula, Bill Fernandez

item.title: A pelican for GPT-5.5 via the semi-official Codex backdoor API 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI released GPT-5.5, available in Codex and rolling out to paid ChatGPT subscribers, with API access coming later. The model is fast and capable but lacks API availability for now. The article discusses the OpenClaw backdoor controversy: Anthropic blocked OpenClaw from using its subscription API, while OpenAI welcomed it. The author created an LLM plugin, llm-openai-via-codex, that uses Codex subscription credentials to run prompts via the command line. GPT-5.5 pricing is double GPT-5.4 ($5/$30 per 1M tokens). The author tested GPT-5.5 by generating SVG pelicans riding bicycles, noting that higher reasoning effort (xhigh) produced better results but took longer.
标签: AI, OpenAI, GPT-5.5, LLM, Codex, OpenClaw, API, pricing, SVG, reasoning

item.title: Nilay Patel: ‘Beware Software Brain’ 摘要
item.description:
Nilay Patel's essay at The Verge highlights widespread public hostility toward AI, citing polls showing Gen Z's growing anger and pessimism. He contrasts this with past tech shifts like smartphones and the internet, which were met with optimism. Patel introduces the concept of 'software brain'—a worldview that sees everything as controllable databases—arguing that this mindset fails to resonate with ordinary people's experiences. The piece underscores a deep disconnect between tech insiders and the public, suggesting that AI's unpopularity stems from real-world experiences rather than mere misunderstanding.
标签: AI, public opinion, Gen Z, software brain, technology backlash, polls, cultural disconnect, tech industry, Nilay Patel, The Verge

item.title: Trump’s Blog Has Somehow Lost $1.1 Billion 摘要
item.description:
Devin Nunes has been ousted as CEO of Truth Social after the company lost $1.1 billion since going public. Under his leadership, Trump Media & Technology Group's stock plummeted 84% from its 2024 debut price of $58 to around $9.80. The company recorded only $10.6 million in revenue against massive losses. Nunes will be replaced by a former Hulu executive. Trump Media had originally promised to launch streaming services and web hosting to rival Netflix and Amazon, but those plans have not materialized.
标签: Devin Nunes, Truth Social, Trump Media, social media, stock market, business losses, CEO change, Donald Trump, technology, media

item.title: Extract PDF text in your browser with LiteParse for the web 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison ported LlamaIndex's LiteParse, a Node.js CLI tool for PDF text extraction using spatial text parsing and optional OCR, to run entirely in the browser. LiteParse uses heuristics for multi-column layouts and Tesseract OCR for image-based PDFs. Willison built the web version with Claude Code and Opus 4.7, creating a drag-and-drop UI that parses PDFs client-side without uploading data. The tool displays extracted text and JSON output with copy buttons, supports OCR toggling, and renders page screenshots. The project is deployed via GitHub Pages at simonw.github.io/liteparse, with a GitHub Actions workflow for testing and deployment.
标签: PDF parsing, LiteParse, browser tools, OCR, Claude Code, web development, open source, GitHub Pages, spatial text parsing, AI-assisted coding
